category_sources: source_facts.description says sonar-scanner launches project analysis with SonarQube; official docs describe SonarScanner CLI as the scanner for code analysis.
display_name_sources: Official Sonar documentation page title is SonarScanner CLI; source_facts.executable is sonar-scanner.
docs_sources: Official SonarSource documentation provides SonarQube Server and SonarQube Cloud pages for SonarScanner CLI.
repo_sources: Official SonarSource GitHub repository is named sonar-scanner-cli and describes itself as Scanner CLI for SonarQube Server and Cloud.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SonarScanner docs describe CI-oriented code analysis for SonarQube and SonarCloud.
